title: LHC Run 3 collisions
question: By 6 July 2022, had Large Hadron Collider detectors begun recording Run 3 proton collisions at 13.6 TeV?
yesRule: Vote YES only if Run 3 collision recording at a centre-of-mass energy of 13.6 TeV had begun by the judged time; circulating beams alone do not qualify.
